generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO have been consistently falling short on their defense spending commitments? While we're doing our part to keep the world safe, some countries are only contributing a fraction of what they promised. This puts our national security at risk and shifts the burden unfairly onto American taxpayers. It's time to hold our allies accountable and ensure they meet their obligations. #StrongerAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
